T001_build_succeeds.notes: make all succeeds with clang on macOS arm64

T010_strip_getpass.notes: Headless mode skips getpass(), uses CONQUER_PASSWORD env var

T012_strip_filelock.notes: File lock checks (RUNSTOP, update lock) bypassed in headless mode

T013_strip_curses_from_admin.notes: newinit/newreset/newmsg/newerror/errorbar handle headless mode; newterm with /dev/null for createworld curses calls

T014_headless_makeworld.notes: makeworld() has complete headless fast-path: env vars for password, map size, water %

T016_headless_npc_prompts.notes: NPC nation yes/no prompts auto-answered in headless mode

T017_oracle_build.notes: oracle/oracle binary built, links against game .o files

T018_oracle_json_output.notes: Dumps valid JSON: world meta, nations, armies, sectors

T020_seeded_rng.notes: Portable LCG replaces platform rand()/srand() via conquer_rand.h macros

T020a_deterministic_verification.notes: Verified: same CONQUER_SEED produces identical world gen AND turn update (MD5 match)

files_modified: gpl-release/headless.h (NEW) — headless mode env var helpers
gpl-release/admin.c — headless UID bypass, env seed, lock bypass

verification.oracle_valid_json: PASS — python3 json.load succeeds, 1024 sectors, 35 nations, 364 armies
verification.deterministic_worldgen: PASS — MD5 match across two runs with CONQUER_SEED=42
verification.deterministic_update: PASS — MD5 match for turn 2 across two runs with CONQUER_SEED=42
